bottom_line: After I-00082 merges, trigger a canary fix-cycle to confirm the scope block appears in the prompt — the S12 fix cycle ran without allowed_paths enforcement because the daemon (running from main) had not yet received the new code.
coverage_notes: All 13 run logs read in full (S01–S13 plus S12_fix1). S10 and S11 logs are 364 KB and 342 KB respectively; grep-scanned for errors and install commands, tails read for pass/fail summary. S12 fix cycle prompt read in full. Worktree fix_cycle.py grep-scanned for scope injection functions. DB telemetry: full (iw item-status --json). No archived tarball — item is active.

findings.title: S12 QV fix-cycle prompt missing allowed_paths scope block — daemon version lag
findings.recommendation: Add a post-merge smoke step or `iw verify-scope-injection` command that launches a minimal test item with tight allowed_paths, triggers a deliberate QV failure, and confirms the fix-cycle prompt contains the ## Scope block. Document the verification procedure in CLAUDE.md.
evidence: ai-dev/active/I-00082/fix-cycles/I-00082_S12_FIX_cycle1_prompt.md — no scope section present despite manifest declaring allowed_paths
.worktrees/I-00082/orch/daemon/fix_cycle.py:1974 — f'{scope_block}' in _build_qv_fix_prompt_content; main branch lacks this line
findings.paste_prompt: /iw-new-cr Add post-merge verification step for fix_cycle.py scope-injection changes: iw verify-scope-injection command or CLAUDE.md post-merge checklist; diagnosed in I-00082 (see ai-dev/work/I-00082/reports/I-00082_S14_SelfAssess_report.md). Target: CLAUDE.md + orch/daemon/fix_cycle.py. Effort: S.

findings.title: Full QV re-run (S06–S11) after diff-coverage fix cycle — redundant static-analysis passes
findings.recommendation: In the fix-cycle re-run scheduler, classify whether the fix touched only test files (tests/**). If test-only, skip S06–S09 (lint, assertions, format, typecheck) and re-run only unit-tests, integration-tests, and diff-coverage.
evidence: .worktrees/I-00082/ai-dev/logs/ — S06_run2=07:37, S07_run2=07:38, S08_run2=07:39, S09_run2=07:40 all written immediately after S12_fix1=07:37
.worktrees/I-00082/ai-dev/logs/I-00082_S10_run2.log (364 KB) and I-00082_S11_run2.log (342 KB) — full unit+integration re-runs after test-only fix
.worktrees/I-00082/ai-dev/logs/I-00082_S12_fix1.log:1 — 'four new tests I added cover…' — fix added only test files, no production code changed
findings.paste_prompt: /iw-new-cr Skip static-analysis QV gates (lint, format, typecheck, assertions) on re-run when diff-coverage fix cycle added only test files; diagnosed in I-00082 (see ai-dev/work/I-00082/reports/I-00082_S14_SelfAssess_report.md). Target: orch/daemon/fix_cycle.py gate re-run scheduler. Effort: M.

findings.title: S02 and S05 independently re-discovered the same C1 budget-filter bug — partial code-review fix
findings.recommendation: Add a carry-forward check to the CodeReviewFinal (S05) prompt: 'Load the S02 and S04 finding reports; for each CRITICAL/HIGH finding, verify the fix was applied at ALL call sites before doing a fresh review.' Prevents partial fixes from burning a second independent review cycle.
evidence: .worktrees/I-00082/ai-dev/logs/I-00082_S05_run1.log:5 — 'Finding 1 (HIGH) — should_attempt_fix (line 482) … plus the aggregate budget check (lines 498–503) has the same gap'
findings.paste_prompt: /iw-new-cr Add carry-forward findings check to CodeReviewFinal (S05) prompt template: instruct agent to verify S02/S04 CRITICAL/HIGH findings were applied at all call sites before re-reviewing; diagnosed in I-00082 (see ai-dev/work/I-00082/reports/I-00082_S14_SelfAssess_report.md). Target: skills/iw-new-incident/SKILL.md CodeReviewFinal prompt section. Effort: S.
